incident: ORA-12541 errors on database and batch jobs failing

analysis.summary: Database connectivity issue causing batch job failures due to ORA-12541 error
analysis.root_cause: Network connectivity problem between database server and the application server
analysis.immediate_action: Check network connectivity between DB server and App server and attempt to restart listener service on DB server
additional_steps: Verify database connection strings and firewall rules for application servers
Run SQL*Net trace on database server to capture error logs
Restart database server if connectivity issue persists
analysis.prevention: Regularly review and update network configuration, ensure up-to-date listener service patches and implement database connection string validation checks in batch jobs
